speaker: Solen
text: Don't be afraid. You were brought here because you are needed. Both of you.

speaker: Solen
text: He lives. He is where he must be — as you are where you must be.

speaker: Solen
text: The Demon King shattered time itself — past from future — so that no one could stand against him. You must reunite what he tore apart.

speaker: Solen
text: I am Solen. Once a keeper of the timelines, now merely a guide in their ruins.
